matchRecap: France defeated Senegal 3-1. Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard picked France.
Norway defeated Iraq 4-1. Team Jordan and Team Megatronless picked Norway.
Argentina defeated Algeria 3-0. Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, Team Jordan, Team koyn, and Team Camouflage Cndm picked Argentina.
leaderboardSummary: Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz leads the standings with 26 points. Team Jordan and Team Choo Choo are tied for second place with 25 points each.
